headline: Aon (AON) Slid on Slowing Organic Revenue Outlook
summary: Investment management company First Pacific Advisors recently released its “FPA Crescent Fund” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Fund (Institutional Class) returned -1.55% in the first quarter, while achieving a 16.06% gain in the trailing twelve months. headline: Will Aon’s (AON) Buybacks and Claims Copilot Expansion Redefine Its Data‑Driven Risk Narrative?
summary: Aon recently completed a US$499.99 million share repurchase in the first quarter of 2026 under its long-running buyback program, reported higher first-quarter 2026 sales and earnings versus a year earlier, advanced its M&A agenda, and expanded its technology-led offerings including the global rollout of its Aon Claims Copilot platform. The combination of enhanced cyber risk advisory leadership and broader deployment of Aon Claims Copilot underscores Aon’s push to deepen data-driven risk...

headline: Diamond Hill Select Strategy Q1 2026 Quarterly Scorecard
summary: Diamond Hill Select Strategy outperformed the Russell 3000 in Q1 2026, declining 0.52% net of fees. Read the full analysis for more details.
